## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on HeyGen's content strategy, focusing on blog articles, translation pages, and tool directory development.](https://fathom.video/share/J5PzH_8SrRGEarspsyXyjppcixAQVucx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [10 blog articles are in progress, with 10 more planned; aiming to publish first set tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/J5PzH_8SrRGEarspsyXyjppcixAQVucx?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Translation pages and solutions page are next priorities for website build](https://fathom.video/share/J5PzH_8SrRGEarspsyXyjppcixAQVucx?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [New features: 40 new avatars, 500 new voices, and in-video text translation capability](https://fathom.video/share/J5PzH_8SrRGEarspsyXyjppcixAQVucx?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Developing a tool directory with 10-15 initial pages, prioritizing high-ROI products](https://fathom.video/share/J5PzH_8SrRGEarspsyXyjppcixAQVucx?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

## Topics

### Content Development Progress

  - [Blog articles: 10 in progress, 10 more planned](https://fathom.video/share/J5PzH_8SrRGEarspsyXyjppcixAQVucx?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

### Website Build and Features

  - [Exploring ways to leverage Agent API for lead follow-up and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/J5PzH_8SrRGEarspsyXyjppcixAQVucx?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
